metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5151
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure S2a: "PDLIM5 is present at presynaptic terminals. Isolated chick ciliary ganglion neuron with its calyx-type presynaptic nerve terminal double stained for SV2 and PDLIM5."

Figure S2b: "Characterization of presynaptic membrane fractions. Synaptosomes were isolated by discontinuous sucrose g isolated by discontinuous sucrose gradient radient centrifugation and were centrifugation and were lysed by osmotic shock to generate a presynaptic membrane fraction P2" that was enriched in three presynaptic markers: syntaxin 1, SNAP-25 and synaptotagmin. This fraction was also enriched in PDLIM5.". Experimental description: Supplementary Figure 2 legend: "PDLIM5 is present at presynaptic terminals. Isolated chick ciliary ganglion neuron with its calyx-type presynaptic nerve terminal double stained (Left panel) for SV2 (green) and PDLIM5"
